zh.lifeSummary: 當Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean於1470年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素時，他的父親Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean15歲，母親Marion Maclean12歲。他去世於1523年11月10日在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年53歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

variants.name: Lachlann
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

nameMeanings.name: Cattanach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (northern): from Gaelic Catanach ‘belonging to (Clan) Chattan’, which claims descent from Gilla Chatain ‘servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Catan’, a personal name meaning ‘little cat’. Compare Catanach .

variants.name: Catanach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfonso, Alfredo, Crucita, Eduardo, Erlinda, Marcos.
Hispanic: unexplained. This surname is found mainly in NM.

en.lifeSummary: When Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean was born in 1470, in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean, was 15 and his mother, Marion Maclean, was 12. He died on 10 November 1523, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 53, and was buried in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean est né en 1470, à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Marion Maclean, avait 12 ans. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1523, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Mull, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean 1470 in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean 15 und seine Mutter Marion Maclean 12. Er starb am 10. November 1523 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland und wurde in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

Chief of Clan MacLean, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Marion Maclean, aveva 12 anni. Morì il 10 novembre 1523, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLeanが1470年にスコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルで生まれた時，父Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLeanは15歳，母Marion Macleanは12歳であった。彼は1523年11月10日にスコットランドエディンブルグで53歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean(이)가 1470년 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Maclean(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1523년 11월 10일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 뮐에 묻혔다.

Chief of Clan MacLean, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Marion Maclean, tinha 12 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lachlan Cattanach MacLean 11th. Chief of Clan MacLean родился в 1470 г. в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lachlan MacLean 10th. Chief of Clan MacLean было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Maclean, 12. Он умер 10 ноября 1523 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф мулл, аргилл, Шотландия.
